#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj*\

##### \
README updated: *Mar-16-2026*\

## `echoconda`: Various utility functions to find, build, and use conda environments from within R.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `echoconda`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echoconda")
library(echoconda)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/articles/echoconda)

Sinai](https://icahn.mssm.edu/about/departments-offices/neuroscience)

# Package index

## Conda Installation

Install and locate conda.

- [`install_conda()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/install_conda.md)
  : Install conda
- [`find_conda()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/find_conda.md)
  : Find conda

## Environment Management

Create, activate, remove, and query conda environments.

- [`yaml_to_env()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/yaml_to_env.md)
  : Create conda env from yaml file
- [`env_to_yaml()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/env_to_yaml.md)
  : Create yaml file from env
- [`activate_env()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/activate_env.md)
  : Activate conda env
- [`remove_env()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/remove_env.md)
  : Remove conda environment
- [`env_exists()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/env_exists.md)
  : Check whether a conda env exists
- [`which_env()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/which_env.md)
  : Print the currently activated conda env
- [`list_envs()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/list_envs.md)
  : List conda envs

## Package & Path Discovery

Find packages, executables, and paths within conda environments.

- [`find_packages()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/find_packages.md)
  : Find package across all conda envs
- [`find_python_path()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/find_python_path.md)
  : Find the python file for a specific env
- [`find_env_rlib()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/find_env_rlib.md)
  : Find the R library for a specific env
- [`find_executables_remote()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/find_executables_remote.md)
  : Find remotely stored executable(s)

## CLI Import

Convert command-line tools into R functions.

- [`import_cli()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/import_cli.md)
  : Import Command Line Interface tool
- [`parse_options()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/parse_options.md)
  : Parse options
- [`cmd_print()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/cmd_print.md)
  : Neatly print commands

## YAML Utilities

List available YAML environment specs.

- [`list_yamls()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/list_yamls.md)
  : List included yaml files

## Other

- [`reticulate`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/reticulate.md)
  : reticulate
- [`install_conda_reticulate()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoconda/reference/install_conda_reticulate.md)
  : Install conda: reticulate
